title: The Swindlers
writer: Suso Cecchi D'Amico, Francesco Rosi, Giuseppe Patroni Griffi
actors: Alberto Sordi, Belinda Lee, Renato Salvatori
plot: Mario is in Hannover to work as a miner but after loosing his job he decides to go back to Italy. When Totonno steals his passport to avoid the police and later on he offers him a new job as "magliaro" (cloth seller), Mario change...
